component.name: SDDM Variant Manager
component.summary: Manage SDDM login screen background variants

description.p: SDDM Variant Manager detects SDDM themes that ship multiple background variants in a Themes/ folder and lets you browse, preview, and apply them without manually editing metadata.desktop or .conf files.
Features include GIF/video thumbnails, an embedded quick preview, and a full SDDM greeter preview using sddm-greeter-qt6 --test-mode.
